_comment: Day preferences for barber booking. Weights are multipliers (1.0 = neutral, >1 = preferred, <1 = avoid). Weekdays: 0=Monday, 6=Sunday. 'reasons' is for your reference only.

4.label: Friday
reasons: Can show haircut at school next week

date_overrides._comment: Override weight for specific dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Takes priority over day_weights.

custom_preferences._comment: Future extensible preferences. Each preference adds a bonus to the slot score.

school_after_appointment.description: Prefer slots where I have school afterwards (can show haircut)

institut_tuesday.description: Tuesdays I have Institut in Bern - combine trips
